@graph.description:
This dataset contains 442 files generated through:

  • Pre-sequencing Quality control phase: NanoDrop UV absorbance spectrum for each sample
  • Sample quality assessment phase (Sample and plate metadata): description of samples and plate layout used for sequencing.
  • Sequencing phase: runs performed using Illumina NovaSeq6000
  • Post-sequencing Quality check phase: FastQC quality control report archive generated by FastQC software Babraham Bioinformatics

It also includes RO-Crate metadata file (ro-crate-metadata.json) that describes the context of data generation, such as the laboratory environment, the research institute, and the instruments used.
